bullets.details: Researchers have developed an AI system that autonomously conducts scientific research, successfully authoring a paper that passed peer review at a top-tier machine learning workshop in just 15 hours.
Cursor has integrated real-time reinforcement learning into its Composer coding agent, allowing the model to update every five hours based on live production data and user feedback.
bullets.topic: Cursor Implements Real-Time Reinforcement Learning for Coding Agents

bullets.details: Researchers introduced Agentic Variation Operators (AVO), which uses autonomous coding agents to optimize attention kernels, outperforming FlashAttention-4 by up to 10.5% on NVIDIA hardware.
bullets.topic: Autonomous Agents Outperform State-of-the-Art Attention Kernels

bullets.details: Stanford researchers released 'jai', a lightweight filesystem sandboxing tool for AI agents that uses copy-on-write overlays to prevent accidental data loss or system modifications.
bullets.topic: New Sandboxing Tool Protects Filesystems from AI Agents

bullets.details: Physical Intelligence, an AI robotics startup, is reportedly nearing a $1 billion funding round that would value the company at over $11 billion.
bullets.topic: Physical Intelligence Nears $11B Valuation in Funding Talks

bullets.details: Austin startups secured a record $7.19 billion in venture funding in 2025, a 64.8% increase driven by large late-stage deals in defense, robotics, and energy.
bullets.topic: Austin Venture Funding Hits Record $7.19 Billion

bullets.details: The Colorado House passed a bill (HB 26-1210) to ban companies from using consumer data and opaque algorithms to set personalized prices or wages, marking a significant regulatory move.
bullets.topic: Colorado Passes Bill to Ban AI-Driven Surveillance Pricing

bullets.details: TrendForce has significantly revised upward its Q1 2026 DRAM price forecasts, with PC DRAM specifically facing a projected price increase of over 110%, signaling tighter supply conditions.
bullets.topic: TrendForce Drastically Increases Q1 2026 DRAM Price Forecasts

bullets.details: A jury found Meta and YouTube liable for designing addictive platforms, awarding $6 million in damages; experts warn this verdict creates an existential threat to social media business models.
bullets.topic: Meta and YouTube Found Liable in Addictive Platform Design Trial

bullets.details: Pretext is a new high-performance text layout engine that bypasses DOM constraints using arithmetic and cached font metrics to enable complex editorial layouts at 60fps.
bullets.topic: Pretext Layout Engine Bypasses DOM for High Performance

digest_summary: This week’s developments underscore the rapid ascent of autonomous AI, from systems capable of peer-reviewed research to coding agents that outperform state-of-the-art software optimizations. Meanwhile, the startup ecosystem remains robust, with Physical Intelligence nearing an $11 billion valuation and Austin seeing record-breaking venture capital influx. On the regulatory and legal front, Colorado is moving to ban AI-driven price discrimination, while Meta and YouTube face a landmark verdict over addictive platform design. Additionally, market analysts are forecasting a drastic spike in DRAM prices for early 2026, signaling potential supply chain volatility.
digest_title: Autonomous Research, Record VC Funding, and New AI Regulation Constraints
